nasb.text: Then the channels of water appeared, And the foundations of the world were laid bare At Your rebuke, O Lord, At the blast of the breath of Your nostrils.

esv.text: Then the channels of the sea were seen, and the foundations of the world were laid bare at your rebuke, O Lord, at the blast of the breath of your nostrils.

cnv.text: 耶和華斥責一發， 你鼻孔的氣一出， 海底就出現， 大地的根基也顯露。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你斥责一声， 鼻孔一吹气，海底就显现， 大地也露出根基。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，你斥责一发，你鼻孔的气一出， 众水的底床就出现，世界的根基也显露。
